## Validation

- [ ] `bun run lint`
- [ ] `bun run test`
- [ ] Relevant documentation updated

## Review checklist

- [ ] The change is scoped to this pull request.
- [ ] Tests cover new behavior and regressions.
- [ ] No prompts, credentials, tokens, or personal data are logged or committed.
- [ ] Security and privacy implications were considered.
- [ ] Breaking changes and migration steps are documented, if applicable.
